summary: Dashboard success state renders correctly with proper billing estimate, usage metrics, and navigation. Visual polish issues present but core functionality and state contract fulfilled.

violations.description: Dashboard uses neutral gray/white UI surfaces instead of diner palette - should use cream #fff8ea backgrounds for cards and avoid generic gray treatments
Signed-in app chrome uses generic neutral palette instead of maintaining visual separation from public marketing surfaces - authenticated UI should have distinct but coherent brand treatment

actions: Apply diner palette cream backgrounds (#fff8ea) to dashboard cards and surfaces
Ensure authenticated UI maintains brand coherence with public surfaces while remaining visually distinct
Consider adding subtle diner palette accents to preserve brand identity in dashboard chrome
